macro.title: Mortgage rates level off, but is 6.5% the new normal?
macro.what: Mortgage rates have soared in the past month, but market participants appeared to take a wait-and-see approach this week as they contemplate further price increases for home loans.
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: A new study says private listings beat the MLS. Here’s what it left out
housing.what: UGA study found a 1.7% private sale premium in DFW, but post 2020 estimates fall to about 0.9% and are not significant.
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.
